channel.title: Neocities on A Little Ham Radio Site
channel.description: Recent content in Neocities on A Little Ham Radio Site

item.title: Argh
item.description:
When last I posted, I was discussing the upcoming—and doubtless straightforward—process of getting this site actually online. The local copy works, everything looks good, there exists documentation to move things from point A to point B, where point B is GitHub.

Yet…argh, I am having difficulty proving that I have permission to do anything with my Git project. Password, key, token…argh.

I noticed Neocities does indeed have a CLI push option. Awesome! (How did I miss noticing that before?) Problem solved! Except…I’m getting errors installing neocities. Issues with needing older gems and newer Ruby. ruby -v shows a 2.6 version (which would’ve come pre-installed on the Mac), despite Homebrew claiming that 4.2 is installed…
